name: Departments Without Courses
description: Streeling departments are created with grammars, weights, and curriculum definitions but never produce actual courses. Infrastructure without output.
detection: departments/{dept}.department.json exists AND courses/{dept}/ is empty or missing
action: Run /seldon research-cycle + /seldon course-pipeline for each empty department. Prioritize by curriculum gap count.
evidence: 2026-03-22: 11 of 13 departments had no courses (only guitar-alchemist-academy and psychohistory)
2026-03-18: Departments created with full curriculum definitions but no production pipeline
2026-03-22: Course pipeline skill created, batch course production initiated
resolution: seldon-course-pipeline skill created 2026-03-22. 11 courses being produced. Blind spot detection grammar flags this pattern.
